easy.title: Swap Variables using Tuple Unpacking
easy.description: Write `swap(a, b)` returning `(b, a)` using single-line tuple unpacking.
easy.solution:
def swap(a, b):
    return b, a

medium.title: Distance Between 2D Points
medium.description: Calculate Euclidean distance between points `p1=(x1,y1)` and `p2=(x2,y2)`.

hard.title: Immutable RGB Palette Generator
hard.description: Create namedtuple `Color(r, g, b)` and return list of hex strings.
hard.solution:
from collections import namedtuple
Color = namedtuple('Color', ['r', 'g', 'b'])
def colors_to_hex(color_list):
    return [f'#{c.r:02x}{c.g:02x}{c.b:02x}' for c in color_list]

debugging.title: Fix Single Tuple Syntax
debugging.description: Fix string type return when tuple expected.
bugs: `(val)` without comma evaluates to type of val. Add trailing comma `(val,)`.
